notes: B0010.r39 simple Wi-Fi recovery. DHCP/IP is the connection acceptance event. Saves up to 10 profiles immediately, attempts every visible saved SSID strongest first without an RSSI rejection gate, uses a 30-second DHCP window, prompts when no known network is visible, and validates DNS/clock/HTTPS quietly in the background without disconnecting a working Wi-Fi link. Retains r38 static OTA display protection, signal warnings, C6 ESP-Hosted 2.12.9, full-file SHA-256 and six-second boot stabilization.
